transcript_title: Department Of War Release 2 Uap052226 Video 2605 Dod 111721747 Dod 111721747
text: Department Of War Release 2 Uap052226 Video 2605 Dod 111721747 Dod 111721747

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 2 Uap052226 Video 2605 Dod 111721747 Dod 111721747
text: I have some pretty stars in sight, and also I have the little white objects that seem to come from the capsule itself, and drift off.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 2 Uap052226 Video 2605 Dod 111721747 Dod 111721747
text: And if they are a yaw check, it's fantastic. I suspect that the star I see is...

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 2 Uap052226 Video 2605 Dod 111721747 Dod 111721747
text: ...Octurus would be very interesting. It is neither. It is one of the white objects.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 2 Uap052226 Video 2605 Dod 111721747 Dod 111721747
text: So I have two stars that are standing quite still. The white object actually looked like it came toward me, but it wasn't.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 2 Uap052226 Video 2605 Dod 111721747 Dod 111721747
text: You can actually see the particle there, going off. As John described, there's a lathe shaving. It's a very good description of it.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 2 Uap052226 Video 2605 Dod 111721747 Dod 111721747
text: My rates are now just about zero in all three axes.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 2 Uap052226 Video 2605 Dod 111721747 Dod 111721747
text: I still have light in the periscope, of course. I'm looking straight up.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 2 Uap052226 Video 2605 Dod 111721747 Dod 111721747
text: And yet, at this point, there's to be that my altitude is...

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 2 Uap052226 Video 2605 Dod 111721747 Dod 111721747
text: I guess the couch here, I really can't pick it too well. Yeah, I'm just about inverted at this point.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 2 Uap052226 Video 2605 Dod 111721747 Dod 111721747
text: And that my nose is above the horizon.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 2 Uap052226 Video 2605 Dod 111721747 Dod 111721747
text: As a result, I notice that these particles keep tending aft on me, relative to me, at any time.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 2 Uap052226 Video 2605 Dod 111721747 Dod 111721747
text: The periscope is blocking out rather rapidly, at sunset.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 2 Uap052226 Video 2605 Dod 111721747 Dod 111721747
text: It's almost blocked out completely at this point, and it's really not usable.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 2 Uap052226 Video 2605 Dod 111721747 Dod 111721747
Department Of War Release 2 Uap052226 Video 2605 Dod 111721747 Dod 111721747
text: I'm not afraid of exactly with the camera, but I'll try to keep it backwards at that point.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 2 Uap052226 Video 2605 Dod 111721747 Dod 111721747
text: Getting a real burst of light in the window and I really don't know what it is.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 2 Uap052226 Video 2605 Dod 111721747 Dod 111721747
text: At this point I should be coming up on a sunset, 5 hours and 15 minutes.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 2 Uap052226 Video 2605 Dod 111721747 Dod 111721747
text: The telescope is dark. I must be just getting a last look at the horizon, yet I'm not down on it.
